patients.title: Patients

patients.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected patients? This action cannot be undone and will permanently erase their history.

patients.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name} permanently? This action cannot be undone and will erase their history.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.description: Manage patient appointments and overall scheduling.
appointments.emptyDescription: Try adjusting your search or filters.
appointments.deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}'s appointment? This action cannot be undone.
appointments.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected appointments? This action cannot be undone and will permanently erase their data.
appointments.failedToUpdateStatus: Failed to update status. Please try again.
appointments.endAfterStart: End date/time must be after start

common.goToTodayAndZoomIn: Go to today and zoom in

user.logOutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
user.logOutDescription: You will be signed out of your account and redirected to the login page.

toast.actionFailed: Action Failed: We couldn't reach the server. Please try again.

errors.loadError: Dashboard stats failed to load. You can still navigate to other pages.
errors.databaseUnavailable: Database is temporarily unavailable. Please refresh.
errors.dashboardSlowLoad: Dashboard is taking longer than usual to load. Please refresh.
errors.envHint: Fix .env then restart the dev server. For Supabase: use the "Transaction" pooler connection string and the database password from Settings → Database (reset it there if needed).
errors.authConnection: Cannot reach Supabase Auth (login server). Check your internet connection and that your project URL (NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL) is reachable. If you're behind a firewall or VPN, try another network.

header.fullscreenNotSupported: Fullscreen is not supported in this browser
header.fullscreenFailed: Failed to toggle fullscreen. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.pageSubtitle: Manage your profile, preferences, and (for admins) clinic settings.
settings.imageSelectedClickSave: Image selected! Click 'Save Changes' to upload.
settings.clickToUpload: Click to upload a new profile picture
settings.clinicCardDescription: Set clinic name and type. Type affects the landing page and dashboard labels.
settings.changeClinicTypeMessage: Switching from {current} to {new} will reset your landing page settings to the new type's defaults. Any customizations you've made to your current landing page will be lost and cannot be recovered.
settings.changeClinicTypeNote: Changing clinic type will reset your landing page settings to defaults.
settings.multipleDoctorsDescription: Show "Meet Our Team" instead of single doctor profile
settings.importSeedDescription: Load JSON data (same format as data/data.json). Same effect as npm run db:seed.
settings.changeCurrencyDescription: This will update how amounts are displayed across the app.
settings.changeCurrencyDescriptionWithName: Amounts will be shown in {name}. This affects billing, revenue, and all monetary values.
settings.changeCurrencyDescriptionConfirm: Amounts will be shown in {name} ({symbol}). This affects billing, revenue, and all monetary values.
settings.changeLanguageDescription: The interface and formats will use the selected language.
settings.changeLanguageDescriptionWithName: Date and number formats will use {name}. Note: only formats change; UI labels are not translated.
settings.changeLanguageDescriptionFormats: This will update date and number formats. UI labels stay in the current language.
settings.profileReadOnlyDescription: Your account information (read-only). Contact an admin to change details.
settings.themeModeDescription: Choose light, dark, or follow system
settings.languageCardDescription: Language for dates and number formatting
settings.toastSelectImage: Please select an image (JPEG, PNG, WebP or GIF).
settings.toastImageSize2MB: Image size must be less than 2MB
settings.toastVerificationEmailSent: Verification email sent to your new address. Please check your inbox.
settings.toastPasswordMin8: Password must be at least 8 characters
settings.toastFailedToUpdateProfile: Failed to update profile. Please try again.
settings.toastClinicNotFound: Clinic not found. Run the clinics migration.
settings.toastClearSeedConfirm: This will delete all clinics, departments, patients, appointments, invoices, lab vendors, and related data. Users are NOT deleted. Continue?

blog.title: Blog
blog.pageDescription: Manage your blog posts and articles.
blog.createPostToGetStarted: Create a post to get started.
blog.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected post(s)? This cannot be undone.
blog.postContentDescription: Write your blog post detail here.
blog.slugDescription: Leave empty to auto-generate from title.
blog.contentTip: Tip: Use standard markdown (## header, - list, **bold**)
blog.authorDescription: Overrides your account name on the post.
blog.toastFailedToCreatePost: Failed to create post. Check console.
blog.toastFixValidation: Please fix the validation errors before saving.
blog.deletePostDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the blog post and remove its data from our servers.
blog.noCommentsYet: No comments yet on this post.
blog.manageCommentsDescription: Approve or delete comments left on this post.
blog.confirmDeleteComment: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?
blog.categoriesPageDescription: Manage category names and badge colors for blog posts.
blog.categoryDescriptionPlaceholder: Optional short description for this category.
blog.categoryColorDescription: Leave empty to assign a random color.
blog.createFirstCategory: Create a category to use on posts.
blog.deleteCategoryDescription: Posts using this category will have their category cleared. This cannot be undone.

landingSettings.title: Landing Page Settings
landingSettings.pageDescription: Customize your clinic's landing page without touching code.
landingSettings.resetConfirm: Are you sure? This will reset all landing page customizations.
landingSettings.toastReset: Landing page reset to default template
landingSettings.clinicNotFoundDescription: We couldn't find your clinic data. Please contact support or run the database migration.
landingSettings.brandNameDescription: Your clinic name as displayed on the landing page and navbar.
landingSettings.logoIdentityDescription: Upload your clinic logos for light and dark modes. Recommended: 300×60px, PNG or SVG, max 2MB.
landingSettings.colorSchemeDescription: Set hex values (e.g. #5B6EF5) or use the color picker.
landingSettings.primaryColorDesc: Main brand color for buttons and accents
landingSettings.metaTagsDescription: Shown in search results. Keep title under 60 and description under 160 characters.
landingSettings.metaDescriptionTooltip: Appears in Google search results. Keep between 150–160 characters for best results.
landingSettings.metaDescriptionPlaceholder: Complete clinic management system for modern healthcare practices.
landingSettings.ogSocialDescription: Used when sharing your page on social networks. OG image recommended: 1200×630px.
landingSettings.fontsSizingDescription: Choose heading and body fonts and overall scale.
landingSettings.featuresDescription: Enable or disable specific features across your landing page.
landingSettings.cookieConsentDescription: Display a cookie consent banner at the bottom of the screen.
landingSettings.darkModeToggleDescription: Allow visitors to manually switch between light and dark themes.
landingSettings.languageSwitcherDescription: Display a language selection menu in the top navigation.
landingSettings.stickyNavbarDescription: Keep the top menu visible while scrolling down the page.
landingSettings.topBannerDescription: Display the thin banner above the main navigation bar.
landingSettings.customBannerTextPlaceholder: e.g. Free shipping on all orders over $50
landingSettings.sectionCopyDescription: Title and description for the call-to-action block.
landingSettings.formConfigDescription: Enable fields and configure messages for the contact form.
landingSettings.successMessagePlaceholder: Thank you! We'll contact you soon.
landingSettings.errorMessagePlaceholder: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landingSettings.contactDetailsDescription: Phone, email, and address shown on the landing page.
landingSettings.platformsDescription: Enable a platform and enter its URL to display the link.
landingSettings.headline: Headline
landingSettings.headlineHint: Keep it short and compelling (max 100 characters)
landingSettings.subtitle: Subtitle
landingSettings.aboutDoctorSubtitle: Doctor name, bio, image, and stats
landingSettings.name: Name
landingSettings.statsSectionSubtitle: 3 key stats and the section image
landingSettings.samePageSection: Same-page section — opens in same tab

auth.loginDescription: Sign in to continue to CareNova and manage your clinic.
auth.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up
auth.signupDescription: Create your account and start managing your clinic.
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.errorEmailExists: An account with this email already exists. Try signing in instead.
auth.checkEmailConfirm: Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.demoInstructions: Run npm run db:seed (with SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in .env) to create Auth users and seed roles. Otherwise create users in Supabase Dashboard → Authentication → Users.
auth.accountConfirmedMessage: Your account is confirmed. You can now sign in.
auth.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email using the link we sent. After confirming, you can sign in here.
auth.pendingApprovalDescription: Your account is awaiting admin approval.
auth.pendingApprovalCardDescription: An administrator must approve your account before you can access the dashboard. You will be able to sign in once approved.
auth.errorEmailAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Sign in with your password below, or contact support if you no longer have access.

billing.markPaidActionFailed: Action Failed: We couldn't reach the server. Please try again.

invoices.pageDescription: Create and manage invoices from completed appointments.

invoices.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient name or invoice number...

invoices.newPageSelectAppointment: Select a completed appointment to invoice.
invoices.newPageNoCompleted: No completed appointments without an invoice.

payments.listEmptyDescription: Record a payment to get started.

payments.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient name or invoice number...
payments.formIntro: Enter the payment details to record a new payment transaction.
payments.formPatientHelp: Required: Select the patient for this payment.
payments.formInvoiceHelp: Optional: Select the invoice if this payment is for a specific invoice.
payments.formDescriptionHelp: Required: Provide a description of the payment (e.g., "Consultation fee", "Lab test payment").

expenses.listEmptyDescription: Add an expense to track clinic spending.

payroll.title: Payroll
payroll.pageDescription: Manage staff payroll and salary payments.
payroll.emptyDescription: Add payroll entries to track staff payments.

services.emptyDescription: Add services to define what your clinic offers, or clear filters.

departments.title: Departments
departments.pageDescription: Manage clinic departments and organization structure.
departments.emptyDescription: Add departments to organize your clinic structure.
departments.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
departments.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected department(s)?

departments.codeHint: Short code for easy identification (auto-generated from name)
departments.newDepartmentDescription: Create a new department for your clinic.
departments.departmentInformationDescription: Enter the details for the new department.

odontograms.title: Odontograms
odontograms.pageDescription: Manage dental records and view tooth conditions per patient.
odontograms.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected odontograms?
odontograms.emptyDescription: Create your first detailed dental chart for a patient to get started.
odontograms.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete v{version} permanently? This action cannot be undone and will erase their history.
odontograms.createDescriptionPatient: Search and select a patient to create their dental chart.
odontograms.typeToSearch: Type at least 2 characters to search for patients
odontograms.interactiveMode: Interactive Mode: Touch teeth or surfaces to edit
odontograms.noGeneralNotesDescription: Add clinical notes here. They are separate from the Periodontal tab.
odontograms.templateRoutineExamText: Routine examination completed. No significant findings.
odontograms.templateTreatmentDiscussedText: Treatment plan discussed with patient. Consent obtained.
odontograms.templateFollowUpText: Follow-up recommended. Patient advised to schedule.
odontograms.exportDescription: Export or print the dental chart for this patient.
odontograms.pdfReportDescription: Generate a comprehensive PDF report including dental chart, treatment plans, and patient information.
odontograms.toothNotesPlaceholder: Add any observations or notes about this tooth...
odontograms.changesWillBeSaved: Changes will be saved to the patient's dental record.
odontograms.chartImageFailed: Chart image could not be generated.

inventory.minStockMin: Min stock must be 0 or more

prescriptions.pageDescription: Manage patient prescriptions and medication records.

testReports.title: Test Reports
testReports.pageDescription: Manage laboratory test reports and results.

testReports.bulkDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected test report(s)? This action cannot be undone.
testReports.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient or test type...
testReports.createNewReportDescription: Create a new test report for a patient.
testReports.addTestReportCardDescription: Fill in the patient and test information, then add the results and interpretation.
testReports.clickToUpload: Click to upload or drag and drop
testReports.fileTypesHint: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC files up to 10MB
testReports.abnormalPlaceholder: Any abnormal findings or critical values...
testReports.testsPageDescription: Manage laboratory test catalog and configurations.
testReports.noTestsDescription: Add a test to get started.
testReports.deleteTestDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
testReports.bulkDeleteTestsDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected test(s)? This action cannot be undone.

testReports.applicationsPlaceholder: Tests and applications that use this methodology (one per line or comma-separated)...

testReports.turnaroundTimesPageDescription: Manage test turnaround times and priorities.

testReports.deleteTurnaroundTimeDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

testReports.criticalNotesPlaceholder: Important notes for handling tests in this category...
testReports.escalationProcedurePlaceholder: What to do if turnaround time cannot be met...

testReports.deleteSampleTypeDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.

testReports.bulkDeleteCategoriesDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected category(ies)? This action cannot be undone.

clinical.title: Clinical
clinical.odontogramDescription: Interactive tooth mapping (1–32), tag conditions (decay, filling, crown), track dental history.
clinical.aiAnalysisDescription: AI dental X-ray and lab report analysis (Gemini), instant summaries and health insights.
clinical.ehrLabsDescription: Advanced EHR (allergies, vitals, documents), lab integration and abnormal value alerts.
clinical.phase2Description: Odontogram, Gemini AI (X-ray & lab reports), automated clinical notes.
clinical.phase3Description: Stripe payments, Patient Portal, Inventory & payroll.

medicalRecords.title: Medical Records
medicalRecords.pageDescription: Manage clinical records, vitals, notes, diagnoses, and attachments.
medicalRecords.searchPlaceholder: Search by patient name or phone...
medicalRecords.deleteSelectedDescription: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected item(s)? This cannot be undone.
medicalRecords.emptyDescription: Records will appear here once vitals, notes, diagnoses, or attachments are added for patients.
medicalRecords.vitalsDescription: Blood pressure, heart rate, temperature, weight, height, BMI.
medicalRecords.clinicalNotesDescription: Notes with author and date. Link to visit when applicable.
medicalRecords.diagnosesDescription: Title, ICD code (optional), status (Active / Resolved), date.
medicalRecords.attachmentsDescription: File uploads linked to patient and visit. Lazy load and preview.
medicalRecords.visitTimelineDescription: Appointments with duration. Drag bars to edit date; scroll horizontally for more months.
medicalRecords.searchByPatientOrPhone: Search by patient name or phone...
medicalRecords.searchByPatientOrFile: Search by patient or file name...
medicalRecords.emptyNoVisitsDescription: Appointments will appear here in chronological order.
medicalRecords.emptyNoTimelineEventsDescription: Visits, vitals, notes, diagnoses and attachments will appear here in chronological order.
medicalRecords.emptyNoClinicalNotesDescription: Add a note from a patient visit to see it here.
medicalRecords.emptyNoAttachmentsDescription: Upload a file linked to a patient (and optionally a visit) to see it here.
medicalRecords.selectPatientAndNote: Select a patient and enter note content.
medicalRecords.selectPatientAndTitle: Select a patient and enter diagnosis title.
medicalRecords.emptyNoDiagnosesDescription: Add a diagnosis to see it here.
medicalRecords.emptyNoVitalsDescription: Vitals will appear here once recorded for patients.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.description: Feature not arranged in this version.
calendar.cardDescription: The Calendar feature is currently being refined and is not included in the MVP launch.
calendar.selectDayHint: Select a day on the calendar to see appointments.

reports.title: Reports
reports.cardDescription: Reporting and advanced analytics are not arranged in this version. We are focusing on core clinic management for the launch.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.cardDescription: This feature will be available in a future update.
comingSoon.cardContent: Check back later or use the sidebar to navigate to other sections.

operations.title: Operations Overview
operations.subtitle: Unified control center for departments, services, staff, inventory & lab vendors
